summary: Iteration 79 - Frontend-only testing for landing page sample previews, success stories, How It Works, and Appeal Statistics fixes. All 12 features verified successfully via Playwright UI tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features verified: 1) Feature cards order: Upload Documents FIRST, OCR Extraction SECOND (line 677-678), 2) Quick Summary shows 'R v [Defendant]' not 'R v Thompson' (line 921), 3) Quick Summary shows grounds as COUNT ONLY with '3' and 'Potential grounds identified' (lines 950-954), 4) Full Detailed shows 'R v [Your Case] — 5-Pass Analysis' with 15-section TOC (lines 996-1004), 5) Full Detailed shows 'WHAT EACH GROUND OF APPEAL INCLUDES' section (line 1028), 6) Extensive Log shows 'R v [Your Case] — Barrister-Ready Document' with 20-section TOC (lines 1105-1119), 7) Extensive Log shows 'Barrister View Access' badge (line 1113), 8) Success Stories: NO 'Story Heading' label (grep returned empty), 9) Success Stories cards show 'Name — Relationship (Location)' format (verified via data-testid), 10) How It Works Step 3 says 'number of grounds found' not 'titles' (line 120), 11) Appeal Statistics shows '~40%' not '25%' (line 231), 12) Barrister View has data-testid='barrister-toc' (line 769).
